title: Feelings & Emotions
description: Describe how you and others feel, react to situations, and talk about emotional states fluently.

activities.title: Emotions and how to express them

items.example: I'm so excited about the trip — I can't wait!
She felt lonely after moving to a new city.
I'm really frustrated — nothing seems to work today.
He was anxious about the job interview all week.
I was amazed by the view from the top of the mountain.
After the marathon, she was completely exhausted.
I feel nervous about the presentation. I'm feeling a bit overwhelmed.

items.front: to cheer up / to calm down
items.example: Don't worry — cheer up! It'll all work out. Just calm down.

items.front: Expressing emotions: burst into tears / burst out laughing
items.back: romper a llorar / estallar en carcajadas
items.example: She burst into tears when she heard the news.

items.prompt: He trained for months and finally won the race. He felt ___ of himself.
items.explanation: 'Proud' = the feeling you have when you achieve something significant or do well.

items.prompt: She studied hard for the exam but failed. She was really ___.
items.explanation: 'Disappointed' = feeling let down when something doesn't meet your expectations.

items.prompt: He's been working 14-hour days for two weeks. He's completely ___.
items.explanation: 'Exhausted' = extremely tired. Two weeks of 14-hour days is extremely draining.

items.prompt: The magician pulled a rabbit from the hat. The audience was ___.
items.explanation: 'Amazed' = very surprised and impressed. A magic trick produces amazement.

items.prompt: Stop shouting — just ___ and let's talk calmly.
items.explanation: 'Calm down' = to become less upset or angry. Used when someone is emotionally heightened.

items.sentence: I'm so ___ about the concert tonight — I've been waiting for months!
She ___ into tears when she heard the sad news.
Don't worry so much — just ___ up! Everything will be fine.
He feels very ___ since his friends moved away. He has nobody to talk to.
I'm really ___ — I've tried to fix this bug for three hours and nothing works.
